content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic Daily Update (Apr 29, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 29, 2026, focused on improving runtime error handling for LLM providers and refactoring the agent architecture to decouple core services from application-specific packages.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Runtime Error Handling & UX**
*   Implemented a new `NoModelProviderConfiguredError` to provide actionable feedback when an agent boots without a configured LLM provider.
*   Updated `DefaultMessageService` to short-circuit and return a dedicated, overridable hint when no text-generation handlers are available.
*   Relevant issue: [#7203](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/7203)

**Architecture & Dependency Decoupling**
*   Refactored the agent server to remove hard imports from `app-*` packages, moving route registration into the plugin lifecycle system.
*   Successfully migrated coordinator, knowledge, training, steward, and elizamaker services to the plugin-based registration pattern.
*   Relevant issue: [#7204](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/7204)

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#21](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/pull/21): Fixes TypeScript build errors related to Bun globals and `parseUsage` type mismatches that were blocking postinstall.

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Runtime & Configuration Improvements**
*   [#7203](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/7203): Resolved opaque error messages by introducing a typed error for missing LLM providers.
*   [#7204](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/7204): Decoupled the agent server from app-specific packages by utilizing the plugin-lifecycle route system.

**Codebase Maintenance & Cleanup**
*   [#7202](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/7202): Verified that dangling imports from deleted re-export shims were successfully cleaned up in the `develop` branch.
*   [#7009](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/7009): Finalized Telegram read receipt logic by switching to ID-based fetching and Map-based lookups to improve reliability.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
